rationale.R1.2: The agent identified a critical internal contradiction in the SA definition and provided a fix, which demonstrates end-to-end engagement with the argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding data, identifying unsupported claims and suggesting improvements.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims but did not mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.
